exerciseHistory.promptSnapshot: AI-powered predictive maintenance capability for a mid-market industrial manufacturer board presentation
CFO of a mid-market manufacturing firm drafting a prompt to analyze working capital improvement opportunities
AI pricing model recommends raising prices on top 20% of SaaS accounts
AI demand forecast recommends 40% inventory increase for hardware retailer ahead of Q4
AI churn analysis recommends discounting at-risk customers
VP of Operations requesting AI analysis of supplier performance data for quarterly review

exerciseHistory.userAnswer:
When continuing my work on the localhost Investigate AI, I assumed it continued where it left off. Yet it rebuild the entire LLM. Which resulted in alterations to the UI, the LLM structure and the prompt base.

If I wouldn't have automatically accepted, I would have pushed back to continue where it left off in an earlier session.

exerciseHistory.userAnswer: Using a range of ready prepared MD files, market analysis and PRD, launching the development through a staged process.

exerciseHistory.userAnswer: For the investigate AI model for Verdara, have Claude make decisions on the trade-offs of having a multi-model agent harness (1 Haiku (planner) > 4 Sonnet (SME agents) > 1 Opus summarising & advice agent.
